# hooks-objects-get-object-at-path

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query query hook for getObjectAtPath

## Usage

```typescript
useGetObjectAtPathQuery({ dbId: '<value>', storeId: '<value>', path: '<value>', refname: '<value>' })
```

## Examples

### Use useGetObjectAtPathQuery

```typescript
const { data, isLoading } = useGetObjectAtPathQuery({ dbId: '<value>', storeId: '<value>', path: '<value>', refname: '<value>' });
```
